title: Payment Mandate
description: Agreement from a User or an Agent to authorize a particular Payment action.

vct.description: Verifiable Credential Type claim as defined in SD-JWT. MUST be 'mandate.payment'.

transaction_id.description: base64url-encoded hash of the checkout_jwt field value, uniquely identifying the checkout associated with this. The hash algorithm used MUST be the same as the sd_hash field for this sd-jwt, or sha256 if absent.

payment_amount.description: Transaction amount object containing currency (ISO 4217 code, e.g., "USD") and amount (integer minor units per ISO 4217, e.g., 27999 = $279.99). Final value confirmed by the user.

execution_date.description: ISO8601 date of execution of payment. When absent indicates immediate execution.

risk_data.description: An map of relevant risk signals collected by the trusted surface at time of mandate creation.

iat.description: The creation timestamp as a Unix epoch.

exp.description: The expiration timestamp as a Unix epoch.
